nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: {{playerName}}, I've been looking at your roster. I think there's a deal here that helps both of us.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I'm listening. What do you have in mind?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Last time we talked, your asks were unreasonable. What's changed?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I'm happy with where our roster is right now. Thanks for calling though.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: I've got a young arm — electric stuff, just needs innings. I'm looking for a veteran bat. Someone who can anchor a lineup.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Interesting. What about a package deal? I've got depth in the outfield I could move.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Who specifically are you targeting on my roster?

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Your starting catcher. He'd be a perfect fit for what we're building. What would it take?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: He's not available unless you're including that young arm AND a top prospect.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: That's an interesting proposition. Let me look at the numbers and get back to you.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Deadline is in two hours. I need to make a move. Are you willing to deal or not?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: What's your best offer? No games, just numbers.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I've got other calls coming in. You're going to have to sweeten the deal.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I think we're set. Good luck the rest of the way.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: My top prospect plus a reliever for your #2 starter. Final offer. Clock is ticking.
